<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.2.5 Chrome/138.0.7204.251 Electron/37.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="28.2.5" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="-Z0RG6W0cNeTKLSk0LWY" name="事务消息"> <mxGraphModel dx="1042" dy="722" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1800" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-2" value="" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;fontColor=#333333;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="200" width="740" height="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-6" value="" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;fontColor=#333333;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1010" y="180" width="286" height="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-29" style="rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-7" target="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-10"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-30" value="② Broker 存入<br style="padding: 0px; margin: 0px;">半消息队列" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=11;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);" vertex="1" connectable="0" parent="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-29"> <mxGeometry x="-0.0116" y="-5" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-31" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;shape=connector;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=default;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=11;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=default;endArrow=classic;" edge="1" parent="1" source="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-7" target="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-8"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-7" value="① 发送 Half 消息" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1080" y="239" width="137" height="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-8" value="③ 执行本地事务" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1085" y="353" width="132" height="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-9" value="④ 提交事务状态
COMMIT / ROLLBACK / UNKNOWN" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1036" y="469" width="230" height="102" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-10" value="Half 消息
(对消费者不可见)" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="544" y="239" width="184" height="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-11" value="⏱ 事务回查服务
TransactionalMessageCheckService" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="650" y="461" width="220" height="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-12" value="记录已处理的 Half 消息" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="460" y="469" width="147" height="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-13" value="Topic: order-topic
MessageQueue 0" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="280" y="457" width="140" height="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-14" value="正常消费消息" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="272" y="610" width="156" height="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-16" value="收到 COMMIT
还原 Topic 投递" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0;exitY=0.66;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);" edge="1" parent="1" source="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-10" target="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-13"> <mxGeometry x="0.0474" y="-19" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-17" value="收到 ROLLBACK
丢弃消息" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-10" target="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-12"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-18" value="超时未收到状态" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-10" target="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-11"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-19" value="⑤ 主动回查
本地事务状态" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);" edge="1" parent="1" source="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-11" target="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-9"> <mxGeometry x="-0.1544" y="-2" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-20" value="返回最终状态" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.25;exitY=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.68;rounded=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);" edge="1" parent="1" source="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-9" target="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-10"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-21" value="按正常流程
拉取消费" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-13" target="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-14"> <mxGeometry x="0.1579" relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-23" value="" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-8" target="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-9"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-24" value="半消息隐藏队列" style="text;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="581" y="209" width="110" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-25" value="&lt;broker内部&gt;" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=15;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="209" width="110" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-26" value="真实目标队列" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="431" width="100" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-27" value="操作队列" style="text;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="460" y="439" width="70" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cl1VGly4prVbldjE8_oP-32" value="&lt;Producer工作流&gt;" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=15;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1076" y="200" width="150" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
